vatRates.title: VAT rates
vatRates.sub: National catalog, shared by all companies · rates are chosen on the invoice line

lawBanner.title: Law 141/2025:
lawBanner.p4: . Exception: the reduced 9% rate for housing deliveries applies transitionally until 31.07.2026. The app automatically warns when the chosen rate does not match the invoice issue date.

states.empty: No VAT rates. Add the first rate using the "New rate" button.

confirm.deleteMsg: Delete the rate "{{label}} ({{rate}}%)"? This action cannot be undone.

notify.deleteError: Could not delete the VAT rate.
notify.toggleError: Could not change the rate's status.

modal.subtitle: Active rates feed the list in the invoice editor.
modal.activeLabel: Active rate (visible in the invoice line dropdown)
modal.rateRange: The VAT rate must be a number between 0 and 100.
